common.appDescription: Umufasha w'ubuzima ushyashya, udaciye urubanza ku rubyiruko rw'i Rwanda.

hero.title: Kibaza ikintu cyose k'ubuzima bwawe. Ubona igisubizo cy'inshuti.
hero.desc: Inshuti ni umufasha w'ubuhanga uha urubyiruko ibisubizo nyakuri, bitaciye urubanza ku buzima bw'imyororokere — byasuzumwe n'impuguke, bihaboneka icyo gihe cyose, mu Cyongereza cyangwa Ikinyarwanda.

topics.title: Aho utangirira hose
topics.desc: Ibyo urubyiruko rubaza cyane — kanda kimwe ukirukire mu kiganiro.

menstrualHealth.name: Imihango
menstrualHealth.desc: Imizunguruko, ibimenyetso, ibikoresho, n'ibisanzwe ku mubiri wawe.

pregnancy.name: Inda
pregnancy.desc: Ibimenyetso, ibihe, kwita ku nda, no gusubiza "bigenda bite niba."

familyPlanning.name: Kuboneza Urubyaro
familyPlanning.desc: Uburyo bwo kuboneza urubyaro busobanuwe neza, nta kugahato.

hivStis.name: Virusi itera SIDA & Indwara z'imyororokere
hivStis.desc: Kwirinda, gupima, no kuvura — nta rwanda.

mentalHealth.name: Ubuzima bwo mu Mutwe
mentalHealth.desc: Umuhangayiko, guhangayika, no gushyigikirwa inyuma y'ibibazo.

aiAssistant.title: AI Assistant
aiAssistant.body: Baza ibibazo by'ubuzima bw'imyororokere igihe icyo ari cyo cyose, mu magambo yawe.

anonymous.title: Ibanga
anonymous.body: Nta mazina, nta konti. Ubuzima bwawe bubitswe mu ibanga.

evidenceBased.title: Ihingiye ku bimenyetso
evidenceBased.body: Buri gisubizo gishingiye ku birebwa byasuzumwe n'impuguke.

footer.disclaimer: Inshuti itanga amakuru rusange k'ubuzima ntabwo isimbuza gupima kwa muganga cyangwa kuvura. Niba uri mu kaga cyangwa ukeneye ubufasha vuba, baza ikigo cy'ubuzima cyangwa ibikoresho by'ubufasha biri muri iyi porogaramu.

chat.greeting: Muraho! Ndi Inshuti — unshobora kubaza ikintu cyose ku mubiri wawe, imibanire yawe, cyangwa ubuzima bwawe. Iki kiganiro ni ibanga. Ni iki uri gutekereza kuri cyo uyu munsi?
chat.inputPlaceholder: Andika ikibazo cyawe mu Cyongereza cyangwa Ikinyarwanda…
chat.crisisBar: Uri mu kaga cyangwa ukeneye ubufasha vuba?
chat.sourcesEmpty: Nta nkomoko zabonetse kuri iki gisubizo.
chat.quickTopicPregnancy: Ni ibihe bimenyetso bya mbere by'inda?
chat.quickTopicFamilyPlanning: Hari ubuhe buryo bwo kuboneza urubyaro?

mySpace.title: Ibibazo byawe, iterambere ryawe.
mySpace.desc: Aha ni ho ibiganiro byawe byabanje biba, hamwe n'ibintu Inshuti yabonye bishobora kugufasha nyuma. Nta kintu gihuza n'izina ryawe — bihuze gusa n'iki gikoresho.
mySpace.clearConfirm: Wemeza ko ushaka gusiba amateka yawe yose?
mySpace.clearError: Ntibyashobotse gusiba amateka yawe. Ongera ugerageze.
mySpace.loadError: Ntibyashobotse gukura amateka yawe. Ongera ugerageze.
mySpace.privacyTitle: Aya mateka ni ibanga ku gikoresho cyawe
mySpace.privacyDesc: Ntabwo ahuza n'izina ryawe cyangwa ngo asangizwe n'undi. Urashobora kuyasiba igihe icyo ari cyo cyose.

login.title: Kwinjira mu buyobozi
login.subtitle: Shyiramo ibyangombwa byawe kugira ngo ugerweho na Inshuti admin.
login.footer: Kwinjira mu buyobozi birakurikiranwa mu rwego rw'umutekano.
login.heroBody: Suzuma ibirebwa, kura ibiganiro, kandi umenye ko ibisubizo ari byiza — kwinjira hano birakurikiranwa kandi bihabwa abemerewe gusuzuma.

dashboard.title: Mwaramutse, {name}
dashboard.desc: Ubu ni uko Inshuti ikora uyu munsi.

kb.title: Inkuri y'Ubumenyi
kb.desc: Ingingo zishingirwaho mu gusubiza ibibazo, zishyizwe mu matsinda.

flagged.title: Ibyashyizwe akamaro
flagged.desc: Ubutumwa bwashyizwe akamaro kubera imvugo y'akaga, ukwizera gake, cyangwa raporo y'umukoresha.
flagged.nothingFlagged: Nta kintu cyashyizwe akamaro kugeza ubu.

settings.title: Igenamiterere
settings.desc: Imikorere ya AI n'ibikoresho by'ubufasha mu kaga.
settings.restrictToKbDesc: Iyo byashyizwe, AI igomba kuvuga ko ibura amakuru yasuzumwe aho gusubiza ashingiye ku bumenyi rusange.
settings.autoFlagCrisis: Ohereza mu buryo bwikora imvugo y'akaga
settings.autoFlagCrisisDesc: Ohereza mu buryo bwikora ikimenyetso cy'ukagenzura iyo imvugo y'akaga imaze kumenyekana. Igisubizo cy'umutekano ubwacyo ntabwo gishobora gusimburwa.
settings.autoDetectLanguageDesc: Hagarika ihindagurika ry'indimi iyo ubutumwa bugaragara ko ari Icyongereza cyangwa Ikinyarwanda.
settings.crisisResourcesDesc: Byerekanwa abakoresha iyo imvugo y'akaga imenyekanye. Komeza nomero z'itumanaho zizewe.
